https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/actions/runs/22597457812/job/65471032213?pr=33421

events.body:
> dup of https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/issues/34503?

Seems like it, I didn't know about that one, will close to consolidate tracking it there since it comes first.
